name: agentic-autobiography
description: ContextOS-style Codex memory plugin for local context recovery, daily journals, and an autobiography dashboard.

interface.shortDescription: Recover local context and write source-grounded daily journals.
interface.longDescription: Agentic Autobiography is a local-first Codex plugin that indexes documents and recent file activity, recovers decisions and action items, writes daily journals, and renders a dashboard.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Autobiography to recover local context, generate today's journal, and cite source files.
